OVERVIEW: Clone an existing virtual machine.

USAGE: utmctl clone [--debug] [--hide] <identifier> [--name <name>]

ARGUMENTS:
  <identifier>            Either the UUID or the complete name of the virtual
                          machine.

OPTIONS:
  -d, --debug             Show debug logging.
  --hide                  Hide the main UTM window.
  --name <name>
  -h, --help              Show help information.
